# Text Content Registry

**Purpose:** Every piece of text content the built pages currently require but do not yet have a real, School-Admin-confirmed value for. Generated by reading `src/config/{school,contact}.ts` and every built page's `content.ts` directly and extracting every bracketed placeholder (`[...]`) — not written from memory or assumption. See [README.md](./README.md) for how this registry fits the wider Content Readiness Framework.

**Two different kinds of item live in this table, and they are not interchangeable:**

- **Content** — a real fact, story, or answer School Admin must supply. Owner: **School Admin**.
- **Process Note** — an internal `Callout` warning ("Before this goes live: …") that engineering placed next to unfinished content as a publish-safety guard. It is not something School Admin writes; it is **removed by Engineering** once the content it guards reaches Approved status. Marking these as ordinary content-to-collect would be a real error — flagged explicitly here so it isn't made.

**Status lifecycle:** `Required → Requested → Received → Approved → Optimized → Published`. Every item below is currently **Required** — this registry is being generated for the first time; nothing has been requested from School Admin yet.

---

## Cross-Cutting — School Identity (`src/config/school.ts`, `src/config/contact.ts`)

Consumed by more than one page, or not yet consumed by any built page at all (**Latent**) — flagged per item. An **Active** item is currently rendered, visible, on a live route today.

| ID      | Purpose                        | Page(s)                            | Priority | Owner        | Status   | Replacement Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------- | ------------------------------ | ---------------------------------- | -------- | ------------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| TXT-001 | Government affiliation status  | Admissions (Overview badge)        | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/admissions`. `src/config/school.ts` → `SCHOOL.affiliation`.                                                                                                                                   |
| TXT-002 | Full postal address            | Contact (Office Information)       | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `SCHOOL.address`. Priority raised from P2 (Latent) now that it's a live page's primary content.                                                                                     |
| TXT-003 | School email address           | Contact (Office Information)       | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `SCHOOL.email`. Priority raised from P2 — one of the two primary contact channels this page exists for.                                                                             |
| TXT-004 | School phone number            | Contact (Office Information)       | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `SCHOOL.phone`. Priority raised from P1 — the other primary contact channel.                                                                                                        |
| TXT-005 | Principal's name               | About (Principal's Message byline) | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/about`. `SCHOOL.principal.name`, consumed by `About/content.ts`.                                                                                                                              |
| TXT-006 | Academic session               | _(none yet)_                       | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Latent** — `SCHOOL.academicSession`. Example format: "2026–27".                                                                                                                                                             |
| TXT-007 | School motto                   | _(none yet)_                       | P2       | School Admin | Required | **Latent** — `SCHOOL.motto`. Optional by nature; only needed if the school has one it wants displayed.                                                                                                                        |
| TXT-008 | Emergency contact number       | Contact (Office Information)       | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `src/config/contact.ts` → `CONTACT.emergencyPhone`.                                                                                                                                 |
| TXT-009 | Office hours (general/contact) | Contact (School Timings)           | P0       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `CONTACT.timings.officeHours`. Priority raised — core to the page's purpose. ⚠ **Overlaps with TXT-027** (Admissions' own "School Office Hours" row) — collect once, apply to both. |
| TXT-010 | Visit hours (general/contact)  | Contact (School Timings)           | P1       | School Admin | Required | **Active** — visible today at `/contact`. `CONTACT.timings.visitHours`. ⚠ **Overlaps with TXT-030** (Admissions' own "Campus Visit Hours" row) — collect once, apply to both.                                                 |

## About (`src/components/website/pages/About/content.ts`)

| ID      | Purpose                                     | Page  | Priority | Owner        | Status   | Replacement Notes                                                                                           |
| ------- | ------------------------------------------- | ----- | -------- | ------------ | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| TXT-011 | Founding story (paragraph 2)                | About | P0       | School Admin | Required | Founding year, founders, original motivation. `ABOUT_STORY_CONTENT.paragraphs[1]`.                          |
| TXT-012 | Principal's message (quote)                 | About | P0       | School Admin | Required | Verified message to prospective/current families. `ABOUT_PRINCIPAL_CONTENT.quote`.                          |
| TXT-013 | Journey Timeline — founding year            | About | P0       | School Admin | Required | `ABOUT_TIMELINE_CONTENT.items[0].date`. Title ("School Founded") is already real.                           |
| TXT-014 | Journey Timeline — milestone 2 (date+title) | About | P1       | School Admin | Required | `items[1].date`/`.title`. E.g. a new campus wing, accreditation, expansion.                                 |
| TXT-015 | Journey Timeline — milestone 3 (date+title) | About | P1       | School Admin | Required | `items[2].date`/`.title`. A second, distinct milestone from `TXT-014`.                                      |
| TXT-016 | Achievement claim (title+description)       | About | P1       | School Admin | Required | "Why Parents Choose" item 3. A specific, real academic result, accreditation, or award — not a superlative. |

## Totals

**71 text items** — 62 Content (School Admin) + 9 Process Notes (Engineering). See [CONTENT_DASHBOARD.md](./CONTENT_DASHBOARD.md) for readiness math derived from this table.
